description: Example inventory for AgentCore Identity credential providers used by OBO targets. This file is documentation/config planning only; provider creation is environment- and IdP-specific.

providers.name: entra-docs-obo
providers.notes: Use only for targets that require delegated user access. Database agents should remain identity_mode=service.

providers.name: entra-ticketing-obo
providers.notes: Write-capable OBO targets also need approval gates, idempotency, and explicit write grants.
